title: Online GLP-1 prescriptions are often fast, easy — and low on clinical oversight
summary: A Yale University secret shopper study published in JAMA surveyed 49 direct-to-consumer telehealth websites and found it is extraordinarily easy to obtain GLP-1 medications for weight loss online with minimal medical oversight. The research confirms clinician concerns that lax virtual care practices associated with the rapid growth of telehealth prescribing could put patients at risk, particularly as shortages created demand for unapproved compounded versions.
analysis_notes: Full article content is behind STAT+ paywall; summary derived from free title, subtitle, lead paragraph, and metadata. The study sample of 49 telehealth sites and the JAMA publication are credible high-impact signals for the GLP-1 telehealth regulatory debate.
